description_long: This is a classic, upright fire hydrant with a cylindrical red body and a domed white top, commonly found in urban environments. The hydrant features three prominent hose connection outlets, each capped and protruding from the main body at regular intervals. The top of the hydrant is fitted with a metallic operating nut, used to open or close the water valve. The surface shows signs of wear, with some rust and paint chipping, indicating exposure to outdoor elements. Embossed markings and text are visible on the body, likely denoting manufacturer or model information. The base is flanged and bolted, designed for secure installation into the ground.
description: A red and white cylindrical fire hydrant with three capped hose outlets, a domed top, and visible embossed markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main hose outlet facing forward, the domed white top, and clear visibility of the operating nut.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting two side outlets and the embossed text on the body, with the top nut still visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back outlet and less detail on the front, with the domed top and base flange visible.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the right-side outlet and the flanged base, with the top nut and some surface wear apparent.
